intro: Oreocarya subretusa is a plant species belonging to the family Boraginaceae, commonly known as a flowering plant or a member of the borage family. It is valued for its potential health benefits, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties, making it useful in the treatment of various health conditions such as wounds, infections, and oxidative stress. The bioactive constituents of Oreocarya subretusa include flavonoids, phenolic acids, and terpenoids, which contribute to its medicinal properties. The most common herbal preparations made with Oreocarya subretusa include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are used in traditional medicine to promote wound healing, reduce inflammation, and support immune function.
